gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/359)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/359)

parts.text: عِيسَى بْنِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عُمَرَ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ

text: كَانَتْ مِنْ أَيْمَانِ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) لَا وَ أَسْتَغْفِرُ اللَّهَ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Al Nowfaly, from Isa Bin Abdullah Bin Muhammad Bin Umar Bin Ali, from his father, from his grandfather who said,
‘From am oath of Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> was: ‘No, and I<sup>saww</sup> seek Forgiveness of Allah<sup>azwj</sup>’.
en.sarwar: 20. A number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad from al-Nawfaliy from ‘Isa ibn ‘Abd Allah ibn Muhammad ibn ‘Umar ibn Ali from his father from his grandfather who has narrated the following: “Of the oath of the Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, was his saying, ‘No, and I ask Allah for forgiveness.’”
